news.headline: New Dräger OXY SR Cap III provides rapid oxygen delivery for underground workers, NIOSH-certified for mining, lasts up to 10 years.
news.summary: A new rapid oxygen delivery system has been developed to aid workers in underground and confined spaces to escape hazardous conditions securely. The self-rescue device activates quickly to ensure immediate safety and is designed to endure harsh environments. It is certified by NIOSH for use in mining and industrial settings. The device can provide up to 10 years of reliable service.

news.headline: L.A. Works partners with Angel City FC to sponsor MLK Volunteer Festival in January at Los Angeles Memorial Coliseum.
news.summary: Los Angeles' largest nonprofit organization, L.A. Works, has announced plans for a National Women's Soccer League club to take action in support of the beloved community at the Los Angeles Memorial Coliseum in January 2024. This initiative aims to bring together volunteers and supporters to make a positive impact.

news.headline: SYSPRO integrates with Adobe Commerce to share inventory, order, and customer data, enhancing e-commerce operations.
news.summary: Adobe Commerce has recently unveiled its integration with SYSPRO, a leading provider of industry-specific enterprise solutions. This integration allows Adobe Commerce to tap into crucial data from SYSPRO, including inventory, order, and customer statuses. By leveraging this integration, e-commerce operations are set to be bolstered, improving visibility and management across the board. This development was announced on October 16, 2024, in TUSTIN, Calif. Such a move is anticipated to fortify operations and enhance overall efficiency within Adobe Commerce.

news.headline: D.A. Davidson manages $29 million secondary offering for CPI Card Group Inc. on Nasdaq stock exchange.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was mentioned that D.A. Davidson & Co. acted as the exclusive manager for a secondary offering of common stock for CPI Card Group Inc. ("CPI"), a prominent payments technology firm specialized in credit, debit, and prepaid card services, as well as digital solutions like instant issuance through Software-as-a-Service (SaaS). CPI is publicly listed on the Nasdaq under the symbol PMTS. The company's core approach includes fostering individual connections and attaining noteworthy achievements in the industry.

news.headline: Three ships from a cruise line received low sanitation rankings from CDC.
Paytronix Gift Card Trend Report: Digital card sales up 7% YoY, revenue up 4%, with digital cards now 34% of total market.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Newton, Massachusetts, Paytronix released its highly anticipated 2024 Gift Card Trend Report. The report reveals that although the number of cards sold in 2023 remained consistent with 2022, there was a four percent increase in revenue from gift card sales year over year. Interestingly, among Paytronix clients, digital gift card sales saw a significant growth of 7% in 2023, now constituting 34% of the total gift card market and emerging as the fastest-growing segment.According to Lee Barnes, Paytronix's Chief Data Officer, restaurants are increasingly adopting digital gift cards to provide seamless purchasing, sending, redemption, and reloading experiences via mobile apps and websites. The shift towards digital gift cards as highlighted in the report emphasizes the importance of leveraging gift cards beyond just a sales tool to enhance customer engagement, expand brand reach, cultivate loyalty, and drive advocacy.For a comprehensive overview of the numbers and insights detailed in the 2024 Paytronix Gift Card Report, interested parties can download the report directly. This information signifies the growing trend and importance of digital gift cards in the hospitality industry.

news.headline: Petfinder and Purina donate 330,000 EverRoot dog supplements to Greater Good Charities for National Pet Wellness Month.
news.summary: In St. Louis on October 16, 2024, Petfinder, in partnership with Purina, made a significant contribution to support shelter pets in the Seattle area during National Pet Wellness Month. Over 330,000 EverRoot dog supplements were donated to Greater Good in this initiative.

news.headline: OliverIQ launches multi-protocol hub for smart homes, offering affordable service. Oct. 16, 2024 - SOUTH JORDAN, Utah.
news.summary: A universal hub powered by artificial intelligence is revolutionizing smart home technology by offering cost-effective service and support. Headquartered in South Jordan, Utah, OliverIQ has introduced a Smart Home as a Service (SHaaS) platform to make smart home solutions accessible to the public. The announcement was made on October 16, 2024, marking a significant step in the company's mission to democratize smart home intelligence.

news.headline: CarSaver introduces Boost Plus, aiming to increase dealer website leads, online conversions, and profits by over 50%.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee, on October 16, 2024, CarSaver introduced Boost+, an innovative tool for dealers that is free of charge. Boost+ aims to improve dealer website leads, online conversions, and profits substantially. This tool is available to participating dealers and has been designed to greatly enhance both the quantity and quality of leads generated.

news.headline: Global MUV Rental market estimated at $7.4B in 2023, expected to reach $21.4B by 2030 with a 16.3% CAGR growth.
news.summary: Dublin - A new report on global Multi Utility Vehicle (MUV) Rental has been unveiled by ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market for MUV Rental is valued at approximately US$7.4 Billion in 2023 and is anticipated to surge to US$21.4 Billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate of 16.3% during the forecast period from 2023 to 2030. This detailed report offers a thorough examination of market dynamics, trends, and projections to assist businesses in making well-informed decisions regarding the Multi Utility Vehicle Rental sector.

news.headline: NY public service campaign aims to promote organ donation amidst a statewide shortage. NY Metro has one of the lowest organ donor rates in the US.
news.summary: LiveOnNY has made a significant change to its iconic logo by removing the heart symbol to highlight the importance of organ donation. As of October 16, 2024, the greater New York Metro area records one of the lowest rates of organ donor registration in the United States, putting the burden of decision-making on family members for a significant number of individuals. This move emphasizes the critical need for individuals to register as organ donors to address this issue.

news.headline: Telemanipulators LLC resumes field service program after Covid-19 pandemic hiatus.
news.summary: The field service division of Telemanipulators LLC located in Cheyenne, Wyoming, has officially resumed operations on October 16, 2024, following a period of rebuilding post the Covid-19 Pandemic. The company is delighted to announce that they are now fully prepared to conduct on-site service visits once again. This news is a positive development after a hiatus caused by the pandemic, showcasing Telemanipulators LLC's commitment to providing timely and efficient service to its clientele.

news.headline: Motive launches Direct-to-Cell satellite connectivity, targeting remote areas. 570M adults lack network coverage.
news.summary: In Toronto, Motive Software Systems Inc, a top provider of entitlement services, has unveiled a new Direct-to-Cell satellite connectivity feature for mobile operators. This launch aims to simplify the delivery of services to underserved remote regions. Approximately 570 million individuals, which is equivalent to 8.7% of adults worldwide, reside in areas with limited to no access to mobile or internet services. This innovation is projected to address this issue by facilitating connectivity for operators, advancing accessibility in remote locations.

news.headline: Intelligence Factory launches OGAR to reduce AI hallucinations; aids healthcare, finance, aerospace.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida on October 16, 2024, Intelligence Factory introduced OGAR (Ontology-Guided Augmented Retrieval), an advanced AI-powered data retrieval method designed to cater to the intricate data requirements of industries such as healthcare, finance, and aerospace. This innovative technique sets itself apart from traditional methods by offering a dynamic approach to extracting data.

news.headline: CalmWave improves bedside monitoring safety by reducing alarms. Successful pilot with Wellstar Health System leads to expanded program.
news.summary: In Seattle, a tech solution named CalmWave has conducted a successful proof-of-concept with Wellstar Health System. CalmWave aims to lessen non-actionable alarms using data science and AI. The collaboration has shown promise in improving the safety and effectiveness of bedside monitor vital sign alarms. Wellstar intends to scale up the pilot program by integrating the CalmWave Operations Platform. Additionally, Catalyst by Wellstar has strategically invested in this initiative.

news.headline: Trustate and SproutEd team up to offer trusts & estates CLE webinars for legal pros, filling knowledge gap in education.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, Trustate, a top software provider for trusts and estates professionals, has partnered with SproutEd, a leading Continuing Legal Education (CLE) provider. This collaboration aims to offer high-quality trusts and estates CLE webinars to legal professionals. The partnership addresses the lack of education on trusts and estates in CLE programming. Trustate's expertise in software for trusts and estates professionals combined with SproutEd's specialization in CLE will provide legal professionals with valuable insights.

news.headline: OFN fully deploys $25M grant from Wells Fargo to support small business lenders, creating/saving 100,000 jobs across communities.
news.summary: The Finance Justice Fund by Opportunity Finance Network (OFN) has provided catalytic support to community development financial institutions across the nation, resulting in the creation or preservation of 100,000 jobs. As of October 16, 2024, OFN confirmed the effective distribution of $25 million towards this initiative.

news.headline: Corbel Capital Partners launches new equity fund for lower middle market companies, closes Corbel Equity Partners SBIC, L.P. with over $200 million.
news.summary: The private investment firm Corbel Capital Partners, based in Los Angeles, recently closed Corbel Equity Partners SBIC, L.P. ("CEP III"). This fund has raised over $200 million and aims to provide creative and flexible capital to lower middle market companies.

news.headline: "Silicon Anode for Li-ion Batteries Patent Landscape Analysis 2024 - Key Players include Samsung, LG Chem, Panasonic/Sanyo, ATL, COSMX, Nexeon, Enevate, Ionobell and Enwires."
news.summary: Dublin - A report titled "Silicon Anode for Li-ion Batteries - Patent Landscape Analysis 2024" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The growing recognition of the potential of silicon-based anodes for Li-ion batteries has resulted in substantial investments to commercialize this technology. Currently, the utilization of silicon-based anodes in Li-ion batteries is progressing, with billions of dollars being invested in silicon anode startups (IDTechEx, 2021). This has also stimulated the emergence of a market for silicon anode materials.

news.headline: AFR introduces new Loan Communication Technology to streamline broker processes. Launch date: Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Parsippany, New Jersey, American Financial Resources, LLC (AFR) introduced its latest innovation - the Loan Communication Technology. This advanced platform aims to improve communication and simplify procedures for brokers. The new portal signifies AFR's commitment to innovation in the industry.

news.headline: GoNetspeed launches fiber optic expansion in Kennebunk, Kennebunkport, serving over 3,000 homes and businesses. Residents can show interest on gonetspeed.com.
news.summary: A recent announcement from GoNetspeed revealed an expansion of 100% fiber internet access in Kennebunk, Maine, including Kennebunkport. Thanks to GoNetspeed's investment, over 3,000 homes and businesses in the area now have access to symmetrical upload and download speeds unique to fiber internet. Those interested in GoNetspeed services in Kennebunk can express their interest by visiting gonetspeed.com.

news.headline: Showtime and MTV announced Community College Vote '24 Campaign to close 10% voting gap for millions of students. Over 100 schools in 23 states involved. Supported by The Executive Leadership Council, ALL IN Campus Democracy Challenge, and other partners.
news.summary: The Community College Vote '24 Campaign aims to increase voter engagement at over 100 schools in 23 states. This initiative has gained support from The Executive Leadership Council and is collaborating with organizations like ALL IN Campus Democracy Challenge, League of Women Voters, More Than A Vote, Poder Latinx, and Poderistas. The campaign is set to boost new voter turnout among community college students to make a significant impact on the upcoming elections.

news.headline: Eagle Hill Consulting ranks 125th on Washington Business Journal's Largest Private Companies list in Greater Washington.
news.summary: A company based in Arlington, Virginia, Eagle Hill Consulting, made it onto the list of the biggest private companies in Greater Washington as per the Washington Business Journal's yearly ranking. Coming in at 125th place, Eagle Hill is recognized as a significant player in the region's private sector.

news.headline: Flexter now has over 1000 locations in the UK and US, marking a milestone in revolutionizing the truck rental industry.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on October 16, 2024, Flexter shared a significant accomplishment in their efforts to transform the truck rental sector. Their platform has surpassed a total of 1000 locations in the United Kingdom and the United States. These locations provide a range of light duty commercial van and truck rental services, marking a substantial expansion for Flexter in the industry.

news.headline: Black woman-owned Flows Tasty Treats to launch Ghanian Toasted Corn and Peanut Mix in COSTCO stores across Northeast and Mid-Atlantic.
news.summary: A popular snack known as Ghanaian Toasted Corn and Peanut Mix will soon be available at Costco locations in New York, New Jersey, Maryland, Virginia, and Washington, DC starting October 16, 2024. This unique product comes from Flows Tasty Treats, a business owned by a Black woman from New Jersey. The launch of their signature Toasted Corn and Peanut Mix marks a significant milestone for the company as it expands its reach to major retail outlets.

news.headline: Spectrum Community Solutions launches 'Spectrum Ready' for seamless move-ins at multifamily properties, simplifying internet activation.
news.summary: Spectrum Community Solutions, specializing in providing internet, WiFi, and TV services to multifamily properties, has introduced a new service allowing for instant activation without the requirement of equipment orders or installation scheduling. This announcement was made on October 16, 2024, in Stamford, Connecticut. The advancement aims to streamline the process for residents, offering swift access to Spectrum Internet® alongside advanced WiFi and TV services. Residents can now conveniently activate services without any delays, showcasing Spectrum's commitment to efficient and seamless connectivity.

news.headline: Numerix acquires Kynex for enhanced risk management solutions & fixed-income coverage. Expanding expertise in capital markets.
news.summary: Numerix, a prominent provider of Front-to-Risk technology for capital markets, has recently bolstered its risk management solutions and fixed-income coverage by acquiring Kynex. This move, effective as of Oct. 16, 2024, signifies a strategic step forward for Numerix in further enhancing its offerings in the financial sector. Kynex, recognized as a top financial platform, brings invaluable expertise and tools that will undoubtedly benefit Numerix's suite of services. This acquisition emphasizes Numerix's commitment to providing robust solutions to its clients, solidifying its position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Havenly Brands acquires Burrow, their fifth acquisition in two years, to become largest digital-first home decor company. They rebrand as 'Havenly Brands' for growth strategy.
news.summary: In the last two years, Havenly has completed its fifth acquisition, strengthening its goal of becoming the leading digital-first home decor company of this era. To reflect its expanded growth strategy, Havenly has rebranded as 'Havenly Brands'. The announcement was made in Denver on October 16, 2024. This move is part of the company's plan to solidify its position in the market and continue its upward trajectory.

news.headline: Global mRNA market to reach USD 738.3 million by 2029, growing from USD 624.4 million in 2024 at 3.4% CAGR.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of October 16, 2024, it has been reported that the global market for mRNA synthesis and manufacturing is estimated to increase from USD 624.4 million in 2024 to USD 738.3 million by 2029, exhibiting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.4%. This growth is primarily attributed to the rising emphasis on mRNA-based vaccines and the expansion of therapeutic applications.

news.headline: Marine audio market set to reach $290.63 million by 2030 with a 3.25% CAGR, driven by demand for advanced tech on marine vessels.
news.summary: In Lewes, Delaware, on October 16, 2024, the marine audio market is seeing a notable uptick in growth. This surge is primarily fueled by an increasing desire for improved on-board entertainment options and a higher uptake of cutting-edge technologies within marine vessels. Key drivers of this trend include the rising favorability of recreational boating activities and the increasing demand for...

news.headline: Ultisana launches in US, targeting Hispanic Americans with metabolic, mental health supplements. Phased transition. Expanding reach.
news.summary: Based in Boca Raton, Florida, Ultisana, a prominent nutraceutical brand recognized by healthcare professionals throughout Central America, has recently entered the U.S. market. With a focus on enhancing lives and strengthening communities, Ultisana aims to cater to the specific health requirements of Hispanic Americans through natural supplements. These products are specially crafted to promote metabolic and mental wellness. Rooted in a history deeply connected to pharmacy and healthcare, Ultisana is committed to providing high-quality products to its customers.

news.headline: Global product stewardship market to grow to $2.45 billion by 2031 from $1.26 billion in 2023, at CAGR of 8.7%.
news.summary: The global product stewardship market is projected to increase in value from US$1.26 billion in 2023 to US$2.45 billion by 2031, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.7% during this period. Released on October 16, 2024, a detailed analysis by The Insight Partners highlights this trend.

news.headline: Comarch named a leader in European Compliant e-Invoicing by IDC MarketScape 2024 report.
news.summary: In Krakow, Poland on October 16, 2024, Comarch has been recognized as a Leader in the IDC MarketScape 2024: European Compliant e-Invoicing Vendor Assessment. The report highlights Comarch's solution as an e-invoicing hub that consolidates numerous systems into a single service. This acknowledgement emphasizes Comarch's expertise in the e-invoicing domain and its ability to streamline processes efficiently.

news.headline: PatientPoint CEO Sean Slovenski appoints Shawn Nason as CEIO, partners with Verizon for Innovation Network at HLTH Conference.
news.summary: Shawn Nason, the CEIO, has recently partnered with Verizon, the founding partner, to present the Innovation Network at the HLTH Conference in Cincinnati. The announcement was made on October 16, 2024. PatientPoint®, a renowned company with over 35 years of experience in patient and provider engagement, has appointed Shawn Nason to this important role.

news.headline: 164 health systems recognized in 2024-2025 WebMD Choice Awards, based on patient and provider preferences.
news.summary: Today, WebMD unveiled the winners of the 2024-2025 WebMD Choice Awards in Newark, N.J. These annual awards highlight top health systems chosen by patients and providers in their communities. The recipients, recognized for excellence in healthcare, were selected based on local preferences. The awards, known as the WebMD Patient Choice Awards and Medscape Provider, acknowledge healthcare facilities that stand out for their exceptional care.

news.headline: Fabasoft Approve partners with Mindbreeze for AI services to enhance cloud-based DMS/QMS system, promising improved functionality.
news.summary: Fabasoft Approve, a cloud-based DMS/QMS system, is set to grow with the integration of AI services from Mindbreeze. The expansion aims to enhance document and quality management capabilities, catering to a wider user base for improved efficiency.

news.headline: Clinical Trial Patient Recruitment Services Market projected to reach US$ 19.1 Billion by 2031 at 8.2% CAGR due to increasing number of clinical trials worldwide and rising R&D investments by pharmaceutical companies.
news.summary: A report by CoherentMI reveals that the Clinical Trial Patient Recruitment Services Market is projected to be worth US$ 9.4 billion in 2024, with an anticipated increase to US$ 19.1 billion by 2031, reflecting a CAGR of 8.2% during the forecast period of 2024-2031. The surge in clinical trials globally is a major factor driving the demand for patient recruitment services, with the number of trials doubling in the past decade and continuing to rise at over 5% annually. This growth is attributed to the escalating R&D investments in drug development by pharmaceutical and biotech companies. In the U.S. alone, the R&D expenditure of biopharmaceutical firms rose from US$ 79.6 billion in 2015 to US$ 83.8 billion in 2020 according to PhRMA data. This increased R&D expenditure is stimulating the need for clinical trial services, particularly patient recruitment.

news.headline: PPG to report Q3 earnings on Oct 16. Analysts expect earnings of $2.15/share and revenue of $4.65 billion. PPG shares up 1.1% at $129.87.
news.summary: PPG Industries, Inc. will announce its Q3 earnings after-market on Wednesday, Oct. 16. Analysts predict earnings of $2.15 per share, up from $2.07 last year, with expected revenue of $4.65 billion. The Pittsburgh-based company recently partnered with Shaw Industries for resinous flooring products. PPG's stock rose 1.1% to $129.87 on Tuesday. For more details and analyst ratings, visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.

news.headline: Netflix's upcoming earnings report on 2024-10-17 may reveal an estimated EPS of $5.12. Shares at $705.98, 52-week increase of 74.5%. Analysts give a consensus Outperform rating.
news.summary: Netflix (NASDAQ:NFLX) is preparing to release its quarterly earnings report on 2024-10-17. Analysts predict an EPS of $5.12. Investors hope for an earnings beat and positive guidance for the next quarter, as guidance often impacts stock prices more than earnings. In the last quarter, Netflix exceeded EPS expectations by $0.14, causing a 1.51% share price drop the next day. Over the past quarters, Netflix's actual EPS has consistently exceeded estimates, leading to varying price changes. As of October 15, Netflix shares were priced at $705.98, up 74.5% over the past year. Analysts' consensus rating for Netflix is Outperform, with a total of 26 ratings. Investors should watch for the upcoming earnings release for potential impacts on stock performance.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs honors Gary Wojtaszek as Top Entrepreneur at 2024 Summit for RecNation - largest RV & Boat Storage with 66 locations.
news.summary: A prominent investment firm, Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS), has recently acknowledged Gary Wojtaszek as one of the Most Exceptional Entrepreneurs of 2024 during its Builders and Innovators Summit in Healdsburg, California. Chosen from a diverse group of candidates across various sectors, Wojtaszek, the Chief Camper & Founder of RecNation, was honored at the event. RecNation, under his leadership, stands out as the largest specialized RV and Boat Storage company nationwide, boasting ownership and operation of 66 locations.
